title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Katakuri, Unknown person #8 as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...just as I began to acknowledge you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or maybe it was just my imagination...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is the colour of Observa- Tion...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Become able to sense it unconsciously!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: PFFETT! What's with those wobbling legs?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Miss Flampe! We're going to be seen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it's be....! Because that monkey... his footing... UFU!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: his legs were quivering like those of a newborn fawn...()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PFFFFETT!! Wait, please don't make us laugh, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How lame! Even though hes super weak and covered w blood... he gets up again and again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He wobbles up... then gets knocked back down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then he wobbles his way back up agaw! Piffitt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Big Brother is looking this way. 🙁

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's going to praise meeee! My heart isn't ready for this yet.

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Ah! Master Katakuri is coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to stop him from moving, didn't you....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that in such an intense battle, his focus was suddenly broken.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I attacked in his moment of weakness and pierced his stomach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that I want to win like that!!?

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
